texto: Live in a place where people are revered for being clever, funny, and creative, instead of rich annoying, and on television. Where they inspire. Where they aspire. Where they dream of the perfect sentence, or the perfect drawing, or the perfect chord. Where singing a line that sums up your generation with a run of simple, cutting words is more valuable than a million Likes or Follows or dumbass Retweets.
explicacao: Citação de Sean Beaudoin Wise Young Fool sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Live in a place where people are revered for being clever, funny, and creative, instead of rich a…” articula motivacao, dream, inspire em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e inspire.
